name: unknown-user2
one_line_review: "SYNUP has gone above and beyond to develop solutions for any custom integrations we've needed."
detailed_review:
What do you like best about Synup?

The SYNUP team is extremely helpful. We meet at least once per week to stay on top of our ever-changing needs. My account reps truly go above and beyond to solve any issues that arise.

‍

What do you dislike about Synup?

Honestly, I can't think of anything. I'm very satisfied with this vendor and pleased that after surveying so many in this space I chose to go with SYNUP as our vendor for directory listing and local search presence.

‍

What problems is Synup solving and how is that benefiting you?

We have over 1000 listings with SYNUP, and that # changes on a weekly basis as we onboard and offboard locations. It's a massive undertaking to keep the data consistent and accurate and SYNUP handles that all for us. They've also built a custom integration to allow the reviews to flow through to our website. Additionally, the SYNUP team is always available to answer questions and help with any search-related issues.
